assertions.description: Output includes 4-6 named colors each with a specific hex code, RGB value, and one-sentence usage note
A palette rationale section explains the emotional logic of the color choices in 2-3 paragraphs
AI prompt color language section provides 3-5 specific phrase variations for different contexts

assertion_results.note: 5 colors with hex codes, RGB values, and usage notes including dark backgrounds
Rationale explains tension/urgency emotional logic in 2 paragraphs
4 AI prompt phrases for light, dark, documentary, and neutral contexts
Rationale connects warm/rustic to food and domesticity
6 colors including cool oceanic and warm hearth variants with full specs
Rationale explains dual-register palette logic for island communities
5 prompt phrases covering ocean, interior, documentary, and seasonal contexts

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
